theme_notes: Taglines riff on: Iran's 'nuclear dust' handover, Artemis II's broken space toilet, Florida tourists' dead-alligator-on-car-roof covered with a sheet, the European F1-shaped KitKat heist (400k bars), KFC+BYD's 9-minute EV charger, South Korea's first oil tanker through the Strait of Hormuz, the court-halted White House ballroom, NBA Play-In Tournament, and the Rick & Morty TikTok dance going viral.
settled: Balanced. Iran handed over its nuclear dust. You handed over your last excuse. Historic.
The ledger cleared. Savor it like the first Korean oil tanker through Hormuz.
Even. The alligator got a white sheet. This debt gets a clean slate. Slight upgrade.
youOwe: Less than $50. The KFC 9-minute charger would've resolved this already.
This is marshmallow-drop money. Children on the ground are judging you.
Sub-$50. The Play-In teams fought harder for worse odds. Embarrassing.
That's a lot of F1-shaped KitKats. Too bad yours were stolen in transit.
Your debt went viral. Not Rick-and-Morty-dance viral. The bad kind.
Three figures. Iran's nuclear dust was resolved. Your debt is still active.
NASA fixed a broken space toilet mid-orbit. You can't fix a $300 tab. Embarrassing.
The alligator needed a white sheet. This debt needs a lawyer.
Mock drafts project your debt into the fourth round. No team will take it.
Near four figures. The Strait of Hormuz opened for oil. Your wallet stays closed.
A federal judge paused White House construction. Your partner is filing the forms.
The KitKat thieves stole $400k and had a plan. You owe $700 and have vibes.
Low thousands owed. Iran gave up nuclear capabilities. You can't surrender one excuse.
The KitKat crew netted $400k in chocolate. You owe a fraction and it feels worse.
The Rick and Morty dance hits different when you're four figures in the hole.
Five grand or more. This isn't a balance. It's a Strait of Hormuz.
Artemis II is in orbit with a functional toilet. You're down here with this debt.
The KitKat thieves will be extradited before you pay this back.
theyOwe: They owe you under $50. Even the marshmallow helicopter dropped more than this.
Sub-$50 their way. Don't spike the ball. The Play-In taught us better.
A minor receivable. Like Iran's nuclear dust — technically exists, hard to verify.
They owe $50-200. The KFC 9-minute charger moves faster than their Venmo.
The Rick and Morty dance spread faster than their repayment plan.
The Artemis II toilet got fixed in orbit. Their debt has no such fix in sight.
Mid-hundreds their way. The South Korean tanker cleared Hormuz. Keep waiting.
The Florida tourist covered the dead alligator with a sheet. Your partner takes notes.
Mid-hundreds owed. The NFL mock draft is more reliable than their payment timeline.
Near four figures their way. A federal judge would issue an injunction. Consider it.
The KitKat thieves stole and fled. Your partner just... doesn't check their phone.
Iran moved faster on disarmament than they're moving on Venmo.
Low thousands their way. The KitKat haul was $400k. You're in the ballpark.
They owe you thousands. The White House ballroom got shut down for less provocation.
They owe you real money. The Rick and Morty dance cannot cover the outstanding balance.
Five grand plus. You're not a partner. You're the Strait of Hormuz, and they're blocked.
They've burned through Artemis II fuel levels of your goodwill.
The KitKat heist was $400k. Your partner is just getting started.
